title: Smoky Chicken Tacos with Chinese Twist
description: A fusion recipe that combines the flavors of China with the comfort of tacos. Smoky chicken, crunchy veggies, and a sweet date sauce come together in this unique dish.
instructions: 1. In a blender or food processor, combine smoky chipotle peppers, night-blooming jasmine tea, date syrup, and soy sauce. Blend until smooth.
2. In a large skillet or wok, heat sesame oil over medium-high heat. Add chicken and cook until browned and cooked through.
3. Add the blended sauce from step 1 to the skillet with chicken. Stir to coat.
4. Add shredded cabbage and carrots to the skillet. Stir-fry until vegetables are tender.
5. Warm corn tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
6. Assemble tacos by placing chicken and vegetable mixture onto tortillas.
7. Serve immediately and garnish with additional date syrup, if desired.
